jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Cipla
jsonLd.description:
Cipla has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cipla:
Cipla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla!
